summary: Recent MSc Cybersecurity graduate (NCI Dublin, 2:1) with CEH and CAP certifications. Nokia and Government of India Hall of Fame recognition for responsible vulnerability disclosure. Hands-on experience with Burp Suite, OWASP ZAP, Nmap, and Kali Linux through academic projects and independent security research. Published cybersecurity blog on Medium. Authorised to work in Ireland (Stamp 1G).

hall_of_fame.description: Identified and responsibly disclosed a security vulnerability in Nokia's platform, recognised in their official Hall of Fame
Identified and responsibly disclosed a security vulnerability in a Government of India platform, recognised officially

note_to_ai: IMPORTANT: This is an ENTRY-LEVEL / FRESH GRADUATE CV. DO NOT include Cubic Telecom, Indusface, or Maharashtra Cyber Cell experience. Emphasize: Education (MSc + BE), Certifications (CEH, CAP, SC-900), Hall of Fame (Nokia, Govt of India), Projects, Medium blog. Hall of Fame recognitions are the STRONGEST differentiator for a fresher. CV should be 1 PAGE. Position as a fresh MSc graduate seeking entry-level cybersecurity opportunities.
